privileged_info_summary: The task involves designing a horizontal-axis wind turbine (HAWT) blade with a 5-meter radius using QBlade software. It uses two real NACA airfoils: NACA 0015 (symmetric, 15% thickness) for inboard sections and NACA 4412 (4% camber, 12% thickness) for outboard sections. The blade requires at least 6 radial stations with chord tapering from 0.5m at the root to 0.15m at the tip. The airfoil coordinate data files are authentic NACA profiles (not synthetic), verified to match standard NACA 4-digit formulas with 99%+ accuracy. The expected output is a QBlade project file (my_hawt_blade.wpa) saved to /home/ga/Documents/projects/.
